exemplar.title: Investigating the Effectiveness of the Expected Goals (xG) Model in Evaluating Harry Kane's Performance in the 2023/2024 UEFA Champions League

detailedExemplarData.title: Investigating the Effectiveness of the Expected Goals (xG) Model in Evaluating Harry Kane's Performance in the 2023/2024 UEFA Champions League

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear introduction, body with sub-headings and conclusion provides solid macro-structure
Table of contents and appendix sign-posting guide the reader
Aim statement is precise and directly linked to the research question
weaknesses: Inconsistent internal numbering (e.g., repeated â1.â) disrupts flow
Duplicated definitions and abrupt topic jumps interrupt coherence
Repetition of background material reduces conciseness
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration demonstrates a well-organized structure with clear signposting, satisfying the criteria for band 3. However, inconsistent numbering, duplicated sections, and occasional irrelevant material prevent it from reaching the highest level of coherence and conciseness.

strengths: Correct symbols used for probability, RMSE and logistic regression in places
Some formulae and tables of shot data support the narrative
Explanation of the linear predictor z is clear and mathematically sound
weaknesses: Notation errors (mismatched parentheses, mis-typed Î²â) reduce precision
Missing graphical representations (e.g., described scatter plot) weakens argument
Links between equations and narrative are often tenuous
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language and notation are employed at times, and there is some use of formulae and tables, but frequent typographical and logical inconsistencies limit clarity. Overall performance aligns with band 2 for Mathematical Communication.

strengths: Choice of Harry Kane indicates a personal interest and contextual enthusiasm
weaknesses: Approach largely mirrors standard examples with little innovation
Coefficients and model decisions are not justified as original
Limited evidence of independent thinking beyond basic template
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration shows some personal interest in topic choice but relies heavily on standard logistic regression examples. Independent thinking, creativity and personal initiative remain minimal, corresponding to band 1.

weaknesses: Reflection is confined to surface remarks with no probing of methodology or data quality
Critical analysis lacks depth in explaining over/under-performance
No discussion of limitations or future refinements
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection is present but limited to basic restatement of results without critical depth or forward-looking evaluation, matching band 1.

strengths: Relevant mathematics (probabilities, logistic regression, RMSE) is appropriately selected
Mathematical level is commensurate with SL requirements
Use of RMSE for model validation demonstrates methodological understanding
weaknesses: Errors in the logistic function formula (wrong sign in denominator) and miswritten sigmoid
Invented coefficients without justification limit depth of application
Some numerical inconsistencies (e.g., conversion rate calculation)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the mathematics is relevant and applied in context, formulaic errors and unsubstantiated parameter choices prevent a top mark. The work uses course-level mathematics effectively with mostly correct execution, aligning with band 4 performance.

strandSelections.reasoning:
Arguments are presented sentence-by-sentence, but links between equations, calculations, and narrative are often weak. Mis-ordered sections hamper clarity, yet the reasoning can still be followed with effort.

This satisfies âsome logical structure and clarity,â warranting band 2.

Several conceptual errors (mis-written logistic formula, wrong RMSE explanation) and numerical inconsistencies show partial understanding. Nonetheless, core ideas are recognisable, giving âsome understanding with errors,â band 2.

The student supplies formulae, two small tables of shot data, and intends a scatter plot (though none is shown). No other graphical or numerical representations appear.

With âsome use of different forms of mathematical representation,â the work fits band 2.

**Strengths:** The student follows a recognisable narrative (introduction â methodology â analysis â conclusion) and ideas generally progress in a sensible order.

**Weaknesses:** Logical flow is frequently interrupted by duplicated definitions, abrupt topic jumps (e.g., RMSE mentioned but never returned to) and mis-ordered numbering in the methodology. Consequently, coherence is only partial and the reader must infer links between sections.

Overall, the work shows âsome coherence in its development,â fitting band 2.
Creating a miniature xG table shows minor initiative, but coefficients are invented and no original modelling is attempted. Creativity is therefore minimal, fitting band 1.
The student notes instances of over- and under-performance but offers little explanation of underlying causes or model limitations. Analysis remains basic, so band 1 for critical analysis.

Evaluation is limited to observing that Kane could improve long-range finishing; no discussion of future data collection or model refinement is provided. This aligns with âlimited evaluation,â band 1.

Reflection is confined to a brief conclusion that restates findings; there is no probing of methodology or data quality.

Consequently, only âlimited reflectionâ is evident, band 1.

**Evidence:** Correct symbols for probability, RMSE, and logistic regression are used, but several are mis-typed (missing parentheses, repeated âÎ² 0â). Variables are not always defined and units occasionally omitted.

Therefore, there is âsome appropriate mathematical language and notation,â corresponding to band 2.

The topic selection is personal, yet the execution is generic. Few choices (e.g., coefficient values) are justified as the studentâs own; most decisions follow standard templates.

Thus âsome evidence of a personal approach,â matching band 1.

**Strengths:** Most paragraphs relate to the stated aim; blatant digressions are limited.

**Weaknesses:** Repetition (two âGeneral Analysisâ sections, duplicated definitions of logistic regression) and filler sentences (âFootball has always been a sport of numbersâ) reduce conciseness. Some irrelevant SWOT commentary appears.

Hence the content is âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elements,â placing it in band 2.

The mathematics (probabilities, logistic regression, RMSE) is relevant to evaluating xG, but the application is superficial and coefficients are invented, limiting depth. This corresponds to âsome relevant mathematics with limited application,â band 2.

Choosing a personal interest (Harry Kane) suggests limited independent thinking, but the statistical approach largely mirrors textbook logistic-regression examples and online xG explanations.

Hence only âlimited evidence of independent thinking,â band 1.

**Strengths:** There is a clear introduction, body with sub-headings, a table of contents, and a brief conclusion, so the macro-structure is evident. Headings guide the reader and the appendix is sign-posted.

**Weaknesses:** Internal numbering (1., 2., 1. again) is inconsistent and some tables are embedded awkwardly, but the overall skeleton remains visible.

Thus the exploration is âwell organised with clear structure,â matching band 3.

Content sits mostly at SL level: basic probability, simple regression, arithmetic calculations. No material extends beyond the syllabus, yet it is not entirely below it. Hence âmathematics mostly at course level,â band 2.

annotations.comment: The final sentence of the introduction ends abruptly (âThe Root Mean Squareâ); complete the thought and ensure sentences are fully written for clarity.
Including RMSE as a model validation metric demonstrates understanding of statistical evaluation and strengthens methodological rigor.
Background paragraphs repeat introductory material on xG. Condense or integrate with earlier sections to avoid redundancy and improve conciseness.
The sigmoid function is miswritten as $$\frac{1}{1 - e^{-z}}$$; it should be $$\frac{1}{1 + e^{-z}}$$ to reflect logistic regression correctly.
The explanation of the linear predictor z and its components is clear and mathematically sound.
The table of contents has inconsistent section numbering and missing page references, hindering clear navigation. Revise numbering and include accurate page numbers to improve coherence.
Placeholder dots in the Methodology entry obscure content. Replace with accurate headings or remove placeholders to present a polished table of contents.
The introduction effectively contextualizes xG within football analytics and conveys the studentâs enthusiasm, demonstrating clear personal engagement.
The rationale for focusing on Harry Kane is clear, but this paragraph restates earlier points; consider condensing to maintain relevance.
The aim statement is precise and directly linked to the research question, establishing focused investigative objectives.
The methodology list lacks a clear numbering hierarchy. Use consistent sub-step identifiers (e.g., 1.1, 1.2) to enhance structure and readability.
The logistic function formula is incomplete; include the full linear predictor in the exponent, for example $$ rac{1}{1+e^{-( eta_0+ eta_1x_1+	frac{}{})}}$$.
Section numbering repeats (â2.â and then â1.â), creating confusion. Revise heading numbers to reflect the correct sequence.

While $$P(	ext{Goal}
mid 	ext{Shot})$$ is defined, ensure its notation matches earlier expressions exactly to maintain consistency.

The log-odds formula has mismatched parentheses and missing operator; correct to $$
abla  igl(	frac{P}{1-P} igr)= eta_0+ eta_1x_1+	frac{}{}$$.
A scatter plot is described but missing; include the actual chart to support analysis and improve visualization.
The reference to the line equation is unclear (ây=xy = xy=xâ); specify the intended line (e.g., $$y=x$$) to avoid confusion.
The RMSE formula is correctly stated, reinforcing the quantitative evaluation of model performance.
The URL formatting is incorrect (âhttps:)/fbref.com/â); ensure accurate citation of data sources to maintain credibility.
An unintended character (âçâ) appears in the narrative; proofread and remove OCR artifacts to improve readability.
Data relevance section repeats earlier content; consolidate similar points to improve conciseness and avoid duplication.
Sentence structure is convoluted (âUsing this: Given belowâ); rephrase for clear, precise communication of model inputs.
The logistic formula is miswritten again; correct to $$xG=\frac{1}{1+e^{-z}}$$ for accurate probability computation.
Assumed coefficients are presented clearly, but justify chosen values or use fitted parameters to strengthen the modelâs validity.
The z calculation uses incorrect notation (â0.05.12â); revise to clear multiplication format (e.g., $$0.05\times12$$) for precision.
The xG equation applies the wrong sign convention in the denominator; correct to include â+â in $$1+e^{-z}$$ for accurate probability.
The table uses mixed font styles (e.g., â¤, S) as shot identifiers; standardize labels to prevent reader confusion.
Defining âMiss = 0â is detached from the model section; relocate this note to methodology for logical coherence.
The continuation table appears fragmented and lacks a caption or clear label; integrate into main results or move to appendix with proper numbering.
The overperformance discussion notes goal instances but would benefit from linking to match context or model limitations to deepen analysis.
The underperformance section identifies missed chances but lacks discussion of external factors (e.g., defensive pressure); expand critically.
Conversion rate is calculated as 100% from 8 shots, but earlier data indicates 6 goals in sample; verify your data and rectify the formula.
Grammatical errors and awkward phrasing (âfailed to conversionâ) reduce clarity; revise for correct syntax and readability.
The SWOT analysis section diverges from quantitative investigation and adds little mathematical value; consider removing or relocating to an appendix.
The conclusion summarizes findings but omits discussion of limitations and future work; include recommendations for model refinement.
References adhere to academic standards and provide appropriate sources, demonstrating good presentation skills.
The standalone URL appears redundant given the full citation above; consolidate to avoid duplication in the references.
